# Impact Metrics

## Theory of Change Outcomes

| Outcome Level | Indicator | Baseline | Year 1 | Year 3 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Output | Members enrolled | 2,500 | 3,500 | 7,500 |
| Output | Loans disbursed | 800/yr | 1,500/yr | 4,000/yr |
| Output | Savings mobilized (KES M) | 15 | 25 | 70 |
| Outcome | Women with savings accounts | 40% | 55% | 70% |
| Outcome | Youth accessing credit | 25% | 40% | 60% |
| Impact | HH income increase | Baseline | +15% | +35% |

## SASRA Compliance Metrics

| Metric | Regulatory Limit | UBUNIFU Target |
|---|---|---|
| Capital Adequacy Ratio | Min 10% | 15% |
| Liquidity Ratio | Min 15% | 20% |
| Loan-to-Deposit Ratio | Max 70% | 65% |
| Non-Performing Loans | Max 5% | <3% |

## SDG Alignment
- **SDG 1**: No Poverty - financial resilience
- **SDG 5**: Gender Equality - 60% women target
- **SDG 8**: Decent Work - micro-enterprise support
- **SDG 10**: Reduced Inequality - inclusion of marginalized groups
